title: Surya's Saturday
subTitle: Surya, a young man with anger issues, channels his emotions on Saturdays, because of a promise to his deceased mother. However, things get complicated when he decides to confront a corrupt cop.

title: The Masterpiece
subTitle: A young man falls in with the wrong crowd and strays from heroic deeds. However, an accidental encounter with danger forces him to change his ways.

title: Bhoot
subTitle: Swati and Vishal move into a new flat that is haunted by the spirit of its previous tenant. Later, Vishal observes a sudden shift in Swati's behaviour.

title: Gollu Aur Pappu
subTitle: Two brothers, Gollu and Pappu, confront Gustaad Khan, a terrorist, for blowing up their garage. However, he decides to take advantage of their innocence by making them deploy a bomb in Ludhiana.

title: Shylock
subTitle: Prathapa, a producer, is indebted to Boss, a ruthless moneylender, but refuses to pay his dues. As a result, the latter decides to make his life miserable at every turn.

title: Indian Soldier Never On Holiday
subTitle: An army officer sets out to save the people of his country when he learns that an entire network of terrorists are operating in the city and are planning to carry out multiple terror attacks.

title: Kaala Karikalan
subTitle: Haridev Abhayankar, a corrupt minister, wishes to seize Dharavi's lucrative land for his own gain. However, Karikaalan, the locality's godfather, fights to protect his people's rights and assets.

title: Shootout at Wadala
subTitle: Manya, a diligent student, lands in prison for killing a gangster who attacked his brother, Bhargav, who eventually dies. Soon, Manya escapes jail and forms his own gang to seek revenge.

title: Seetharama Kalyana
subTitle: Arya, a righteous man, falls in love with a small-town woman named Geetha, unaware of the obstacles that lie ahead for both of them.

title: Bholaa Shankar
subTitle: A cab driver in Calcutta struggles to rebuild his life with his sister while confronting a haunting past. Subsequently, he fights to protect his future and family from the city's gritty underworld.

title: Bhagavanth Kesari
subTitle: A former prisoner is adamant about training his adoptive daughter to join the Indian Army. However, his mission is interrupted by a conflict with a ruthless businessman.

title: Gaalodu
subTitle: After fighting with a villager's son, Raju leaves for the big city, and there he meets Shukla, a nice woman from a rich family. However, this chance meeting could change Raju's life.

title: Gaalodu
subTitle: After fighting with a villager's son, Raju leaves for the big city, and there he meets Shukla, a nice woman from a rich family. However, this chance meeting could change Raju's life.

title: 777 Charlie
subTitle: Dharma, a broken man drowning in despair, finds his world transformed when he rescues Charlie, an abused pup. Later, they embark on a journey of hope and redemption.

title: Main Aur Mr. Riight
subTitle: Alia is often bullied by her friends for not having a boyfriend. She hires Sukhwinder to act as her boyfriend but things take a wrong turn when both Sukhwinder and Abhay, her friend, start liking her.

title: I Love You
subTitle: Santosh, a carefree youth, parts ways with his lover, Dharmika, during his college days. Years later, after his marriage to Gowri, he runs into her, which leaves him in a dilemma.

title: A1 Express
subTitle: A young man falls in love with a hockey player and tries to woo her. However, he soon finds himself opposing a corrupt politician's plan to demolish the ground his lover's team practices on.

title: Satyabhama
subTitle: ACP Satyabhama embarks on an investigation into a missing person case, which leads her to uncover dark secrets hidden within the town. However, as she delves deeper, her past begins to haunt her.

title: Dumdaar Khiladi 2
subTitle: Balu grows up without the love of a family due to his parents' untimely death. Later, he decides to establish a firm to help people like himself receive the affection they missed out on.

title: Sita Ramam
subTitle: Upon returning to Pakistan, Afreen sets off to fulfil her grandfather's wish of delivering a letter from Ram to Sita. Along the way, she finds Ram and learns about their love story.

title: Godfather
subTitle: The chief minister's passing wreaks havoc across the state and in his political party. However, a mysterious contender for the post rises to eradicate wrongdoers.

title: Liger -- Saala Crossbreed
subTitle: A talented young MMA fighter trains hard to rise up the ranks. However, his goals are hindered when his lover is kidnapped.

title: Naa Saami Ranga
subTitle: A man gains great notoriety in his village for his unmatched strength and brutal nature, which makes him a target of antisocial elements with a ruthless agenda.

title: Big Brother
subTitle: Sachi dreams of a tranquil life with his family after serving his time in prison. However, fate has other plans for the ex-convict when he encounters a dangerous drug lord.

title: Damayanthi
subTitle: A young man struggles to pay off his father's debts and decides to visit his family's abandoned bungalow. However, he soon realises that it is haunted by a vengeful ghost.

title: Damayanthi
subTitle: A young man struggles to pay off his father's debts and decides to visit his family's abandoned bungalow. However, he soon realises that it is haunted by a vengeful ghost.

title: Fever
subTitle: An assassin loses his memory in an accident. He wakes up knowing only his name, and a subconscious memory of a crime he has committed.

title: Striker
subTitle: Life changes for Surya, a young boy from Mumbai when he returns home following communal riots. He goes on to become a carrom champion and is pursued by Jaleel, head of a betting syndicate.

title: Neevevaro
subTitle: Kalyan, a chef who is visually impaired, promises to help Vennela, the woman he loves, after learning about her financial problems. However, he inadvertently ends up discovering her hidden truth.

title: Master Piece
subTitle: A young man falls in with the wrong crowd and strays from heroic deeds. However, an accidental encounter with danger forces him to change his ways.

title: Hum
subTitle: A man is determined to kill a cruel businessman to get revenge for his father's death but is stopped by an inspector who is the mastermind behind the troubles.

title: Bhagam Bhag
subTitle: Champak and his theatre troupe travel to London for a show. However, their plans go awry when they accidentally become pawns in a murder and drug conspiracy.

title: Inspector Vijay
subTitle: Vijay, an honest police officer, meets Samyukta at a cafe and falls in love with her. However, his life changes when he witnesses a kidnapping and ends up helping a lonely woman, Lavanya.

title: Big Brother
subTitle: Sachi dreams of a tranquil life with his family after serving his time in prison. However, fate has other plans for the ex-convict when he encounters a dangerous drug lord.

title: Thammudu
subTitle: A brother and a sister share a close bond. Later, when his sister faces multiple challenges in life, he strives to protect her at any cost.

title: Vijay Raghavan
subTitle: An honest IAS officer devotes his life to the upliftment of the youth in his locality. However, a corrupt businessman's ploy to poison these young minds compels him to challenge the criminal.
